name: ConcatenatedModules
description: Extract modules concatenated by the bundler

name: AlwaysExpandProfiles
description: Always opens user profiles in expanded full-window mode

name: Animalese
description: Plays Animalese sounds from Animal Crossing for each sent message

name: AtSomeone
description: Mentions a random person in the channel

name: AutoZipper
description: Automatically zips specified file types and folders before uploading them to Discord

name: BetterCommands
description: Enhances the commands system with multiple improvements

name: BetterGifLoad
description: Change the quality of GIFs in the GIF picker. Improves performance and lowers internet usage.

name: BetterPlusReacts
description: The number of + signs before :emoji: determines which message the reaction will be added to

name: BlockKrisp
description: Prevents Krisp noise cancellation from loading

name: BypassPinPrompt
description: Bypasses the pin and unpin confirmation when using pin functions

name: CleanerChannelGroups
description: Hides all channels within collapsed categories even if they contain unread messages.

name: CleanChannelName
description: Removes emojis and decorations from channel names, and shows the original name when editing.

name: CopyStatusUrls
description: Copies a user's status URL when right-clicking on it

name: Equissant
description: Plays a croissant sound every N clicks :trolley:

name: InviteDefaults
description: Allows you to customize default values when creating server invites.

name: KeyboardSounds
description: Adds sound effects from OperaGX or osu! when typing on the keyboard.

name: MessageBurst
description: Merges messages sent within a time period with your previous message if nobody else sent a message before you.

name: MessageNotifier
description: Sends notifications when selected users send a message

name: MiddleClickTweaks
description: Various middle click tweaks, such as with pasting and link opening.

name: MoreCommands
description: Adds various fun and useful commands

name: Moyai
description: Plays a 🗿 sound effect when a moyai emoji is sent, reacted with, or used as a voice effect in your current channel.

name: NoNitroUpsell
description: Removes all Nitro upsell prompts by tricking the client into thinking you are subscribed.

name: NoPushToTalk
description: Bypasses the push-to-talk requirement in voice channels that enforce it.

name: NoRPC
description: Disables Discord's RPC server.

name: NormalizeMessageLinks
description: Removes canary/ptb from message links

name: NoRoleHeaders
description: We are all equal!! Removes role headers from the member list.

name: PartyMode
description: Lets you use party mode because the party never stops ✨

name: PolishWording
description: Modifies your messages to make them prettier and better written. Check the settings

name: ReplyPingControl
description: Control whether to always or never receive reply notifications, with whitelist and blacklist features

name: SedEnhanced
description: Expands on Discord's rudimentary `sed` support.

name: ShowResourceChannels
description: Shows channels hidden behind server resources in the channel list.

name: SilenceUsers
description: Silences @mention notifications and server badge counts from specific users. Regular messages and DMs are unaffected.

name: SplitLargeMessages
description: Splits long messages into multiple parts to fit Discord's message limit.

name: StatusWhileActive
description: Automatically updates your online status when joining a voice channel.

name: StopAutoUnread
description: Stops Discord from automatically bumping a channels notification setting to "All Messages"

name: StreamingCodecDisabler
description: Disable the streaming codecs of your choice

name: TiktokTTS
description: Adds a context menu option to read chat messages with TikTok TTS :sob:

name: Title
description: Replaces the window title prefix

name: ToggleVideoBind
description: Adds a customizable shortcut to toggle the camera.

name: UnlimitedAccounts
description: Increases the maximum number of accounts you can add.

name: VoiceJoinMessages
description: Receive client-side temporary messages when your friends join voice channels

name: WriteUpperCase
description: Capitalizes the first letter of each sentence in message inputs

name: AltKrispSwitch
description: Makes the noise cancellation window toggle between None and Krisp instead of Krisp and Standard

name: ArabicAutoUpdater
description: Automatically checks for Esharq updates and notifies you when a new version is available

name: BannersEverywhere
description: Displays banners in the member list

name: DecodeBase64
description: Decode Base64 content in any message and copy the decoded content

name: BetterActivities
description: Shows activity icons in the member list and allows viewing all activities

name: BetterAudioPlayer
description: Adds a spectrograph and oscilloscope visualizer to audio players in attachments

name: BetterBlockedUsers
description: Enables searching the blocked users list and makes names copyable in settings.

name: BetterBanReasons
description: Create custom reasons for the ban dialog, or show a text input by default instead of the dropdown

name: BetterForwards
description: Message forward utilities including NSFW bypass and UI improvements.

name: BetterInvites
description: Shows invite expiry dates and allows viewing the inviter's profile and browsing the server before joining by clicking the name

name: BlockKeywords
description: Blocks messages containing specific user-defined keywords, as if the user sending them was blocked.

name: ChannelTabs
description: Allows browsing your most visited channels in browser-like tabs

name: BypassStatus
description: Continue receiving notifications from specific sources even in Do Not Disturb. Right-click users/channels/servers to configure them to bypass DND.

name: ChannelBadges
description: Adds badges to channels based on their type

name: ClickableRoles
description: Allows clicking on roles in profiles and the member list to view who holds them.

name: ClientSideBlock
description: Lets you locally hide almost all content from any user

name: ClipUpload
description: Adds a button to upload a local video file as a Discord clip.

name: ClipsEnhancements
description: Add more Clip FPS and duration options, custom clip length, RPC tagging and more

name: ContentWarning
description: Lets you specify words that get automatically blurred. Hovering over blurred content or clicking it reveals it.

name: CommandPalette
description: Raycast style command palette for running actions anywhere in Discord

name: CopyProfileColors
description: Copies a user's profile gradient colors to the clipboard.

name: CursorBuddy
description: Adds an animated character that follows your cursor

name: CustomFolderIcons
description: Allows customizing folder icons with any PNG image

name: CopyUserMention
description: Adds a button to copy a user mention from the context menu, works best with ValidUser.

name: CustomSounds
description: Customize Discord sounds

name: CustomStatusTimeouts
description: Adds customizable preset durations for status timeouts in the presence menu

name: CustomTimestamps
description: Custom time formats for messages and tooltips

name: Declutter
description: Tidies up Discord by removing non-essential UI elements like profile effects, shop tabs, boost info, and more.

name: CustomUserColors
description: Lets you assign a custom color to any user anywhere! Recommended to use with typingTweaks and roleColorEverywhere

name: DisableCameras
description: Disables cameras in calls by default

name: DiscordDevBanner
description: Enables the Discord developer info banner to display the build ID

name: DownloadAllAttachments
description: Adds a popover button to download all attachments in a message at once.

name: DragFavoriteEmotes
description: Allows reordering favorite emotes by drag and drop

name: Dragify
description: Drag users, channels, or servers into chat to insert mentions or invites.

name: ElementHighlighter
description: Highlight and inspect UI elements with ease.

name: EquibopStreamFixes
description: Attempts to fix stream quality on Equibop by tweaking Discord's encoder and quality restrictions.

name: EquicordToolbox
description: Adds a button next to the inbox button in the channel header with quick Equicord actions

name: EquicordHelper
description: Used for providing support and fixing bugs caused by Discord and various other features.

name: ExitSounds
description: Plays soundboard sounds when disconnecting from voice.

name: ExportMessages
description: Allows you to export any message to a file

name: FastDeleteChannels
description: Adds a trash icon to quickly delete channels

name: FavouriteAnything
description: Allows adding any image, video, or attachment to favourites

name: FindReply
description: Jumps to the earliest reply to a message in a channel (lets you follow old conversations easily).

name: FileUpload
description: Upload files to hosting services like Zipline, Nest, S3, and WebDAV

name: FollowVoiceUser
description: Follow a friend into voice chat.

name: FontLoader
description: Loads any font from Google Fonts

name: FrequentQuickSwitcher
description: Reorders Quick Switcher results to show the most frequently used channels first

name: FixFileExtensions
description: Fixes file extensions by renaming them to a supported format when possible

name: FriendCodes
description: Generates friend codes for easily adding friends

name: FriendTags
description: Allows filtering by custom tags in the quick switcher by starting the search with &

name: FriendshipRanks
description: Adds badges that show how long you have been friends with a user

name: FullVCPFP
description: Makes the profile picture fill the entire user tile in voice channels

name: GifCollections
description: Allows creating and organizing custom GIF collections

name: Ghosted
description: Shows a ghost if you haven't replied to their DMs

name: GifMaker
description: Create and caption GIFs from any media in chat or the GIF picker.

name: GitHubRepos
description: Displays a user's public GitHub repositories in their profile

name: GlobalBadges
description: Adds global badges from other Discord modifications

name: GoogleThat
description: Adds a command to send a web search link

name: HideChatButtons
description: Allows hiding chat buttons

name: GuildPickerDumper
description: Adds a context menu option to download emojis and stickers from any server

name: HideServers
description: Allows hiding servers from the guild list and quick switcher by right-clicking them

name: HomeTyping
description: Turns the home button into a typing indicator when someone is typing in your DMs

name: HideMessages
description: Temporarily hide messages and DMs until you restart.

name: Husk
description: Adds a Husk button (see settings to change the emoji used)

name: HopOn
description: Hop on! Opens a configurable URL when a message matches a custom regex in the current channel.

name: IRememberYou
description: Locally saves everyone you've interacted with (including servers) as a backup in case of loss

name: IconViewer
description: Adds a new tab in settings to preview all icons

name: IdleAutoRestart
description: Automatically restarts the client after a configurable idle period, avoiding restarts while you're in a voice channel.

name: InRole
description: See who has a specific role via the context menu or the /inrole command (read plugin info!)

name: IgnoreCalls
description: Allows you to ignore calls from specific users or group DMs.

name: InstantScreenshare
description: Instantly starts screensharing when joining a voice channel, with support for desktop, windows, video cameras, and capture cards

name: Ingtoninator
description: Adds 'ington' as a suffix to a random word in your message

name: InvisibleChat
description: Encrypt your messages in a sneaky way!

name: JumpTo
description: Adds context menu options to jump to the first or last message in a channel or DM

name: Jumpscare
description: Adds a configurable chance to jumpscare you every time you open a channel. Inspired by Geometry Dash Mega Hack

name: KeyboardNavigation
description: Allows you to navigate the UI using your keyboard.

name: LastActive
description: Allows jumping to the last active message from you or another user in a channel or server

name: KeywordNotify
description: Sends a notification if a message matches specified keywords or regex patterns

name: LimitlessScreenshare
description: Adds a slider for screenshare resolution and fps.

name: MarkdownTables
description: Render GitHub-style markdown tables in Discord messages.

name: LoginWithQR
description: Allows you to log into another device by scanning a login QR code, just like on mobile!

name: MediaPlaybackSpeed
description: Allows changing the (default) playback speed of media

name: MessageBookmarks
description: Save messages as private bookmarks and organize them in a beautiful panel with search

name: MessageColors
description: Displays color codes like #FF0042 inside messages

name: MessageFetchTimer
description: Shows how long it took to load messages in the current channel

name: MessageLinkTooltip
description: Adds a message preview tooltip when hovering over message links, replies, and forwarded messages.

name: MessageLoggerEnhanced
description: Enhances MessageLogger by adding a message edit log, ghost ping detection, and more

name: MessagePeek
description: Shows a preview of the last message and timestamp in the DM list.

name: MessageTranslate
description: Automatically translates messages to your language with caching, channel switching, and more options

name: MicLoopbackTester
description: Adds a microphone loopback test icon to the user panel

name: MoreUserTags
description: Adds tags for webhooks and admin roles (owner, moderator, etc.)

name: MoreStickers
description: Adds sticker packs from other social media platforms. (e.g. LINE)

name: MusicControls
description: Music controls and lyrics for multiple services

name: NeverPausePreviews
description: Prevents call/PiP previews (screen share, streams, etc.) from pausing even when focus is lost

name: NewPluginsManager
description: A tool that notifies you when new plugins are added to Equicord

name: NotificationTitle
description: Makes desktop notifications more detailed and informative

name: OrbolayBridge
description: Bridge plugin to connect Orbolay to Discord

name: CancelFriendRequest
description: Adds a way to cancel outgoing friend requests from profiles.

name: PersonalAnalytics
description: Tracks your personal Discord activity and shows a beautiful stats dashboard.

name: PingNotifications
description: Customizable notifications with improved mention formatting

name: PinIcon
description: Adds a pin icon on pinned messages

name: PlatformSpoofer
description: Spoof the platform or device you are using

name: ProfileSets
description: Allows you to save and load different profile settings, via the profile section in settings.

name: Questify
description: Enhances quest features, removes annoyances, or hides quests entirely.

name: QuickThemeSwitcher
description: Quickly switch between themes using keyboard shortcuts.

name: Quoter
description: Adds the ability to create an inspirational quote image from a message.

name: RandomVoice
description: Adds a button next to the mute button to join a random voice channel.

name: RecentDMSwitcher
description: Switch between most used DMs using Ctrl+Tab (Ctrl+Shift+Tab to reverse)

name: RemixRevived
description: Brings back the Remix feature and brings it to desktop.

name: RepeatMessages
description: Allows quickly repeating messages. Holding Shift while clicking repeat will reply to the message.

name: RichMagnetLinks
description: Displays magnet links as interactive message links.

name: RichPresence
description: Unified Rich Presence hub for AudioBookShelf, osu!, stats.fm, Jellyfin, ListenBrainz, and Gensokyo Radio.

name: RPCEditor
description: Modify the type and content of any Rich Presence

name: RPCStats
description: Displays your activity stats as RPC

name: ScheduledMessages
description: Schedule messages to be sent at a specific time or after a delay.

name: SaveFavoriteGIFs
description: Export favorite GIF links

name: ScreenRecorder
description: Adds an option to record your screen and upload the recording to the channel.

name: SearchFix
description: Fixes the annoying "We dropped the magnifying glass!" error.

name: ServerSearch
description: Enables quickly navigating between servers via a quick search button.

name: SekaiStickers
description: Sekai stickers integrated into Discord, originally sourced from github.com/TheOriginalAyaka

name: ShowBadgesInChat
description: Shows user badges next to their name in chat.

name: ShowMessageEmbeds
description: Adds a context menu option to show embeds for links that don't have one.

name: ShowSongName
description: Shows the song name instead of the artist in Spotify activity.

name: Signature
description: Automatic signature/sign-off text

name: Snowfall
description: It snows on Discord

name: Soggy
description: Adds the Soggy button to the toolbar

name: SongLink
description: Adds streaming service buttons below song links

name: SongSpotlight
description: Shows the songs you're listening to on your profile

name: SpotifyActivityToggle
description: Adds a toggle button to show/hide Spotify activity.

name: StatusPresets
description: Allows you to save and apply your statuses later

name: StickerBlocker
description: Allows you to block stickers from being displayed.

name: SteamStatusSync
description: Sync your status with Steam! (Online, Away, Invisible, or Offline.)

name: Streaks
description: Shows a daily message streak next to users you exchange DMs with.

name: TalkInReverse
description: Reverses the message content before sending it.

name: ThemeLibrary
description: A theme library for Vencord.

name: TidalEmbeds
description: Embeds TIDAL songs for direct playback inside Discord.

name: Timezones
description: Displays users' local time in profiles and message headers

name: ToastNotifications
description: Shows toast notifications, configurable for DMs, groups, friends, and server channels.

name: ToneIndicators
description: Shows tooltips for tone indicators like /srs and /gen in sent messages.

name: Translate+
description: Vencord translate plugin with support for conlang languages!

name: TriviaAI
description: A plugin that helps you answer trivia questions using AI.

name: UnitConverter
description: Converts metric units to imperial and vice versa

name: UniversalMention
description: Mention any user regardless of channel access permissions.

name: UrlHighlighter
description: Highlights URLs in messages that match your custom patterns.

name: UnreadCountBadge
description: Shows unread message count badges on channels in the channel list

name: UserPFP
description: Lets you use an animated profile picture without Nitro

name: UserpluginInstaller
description: Install user plugins with a single button click.

name: VcNarratorCustom
description: Announces when users join, leave, or move voice channels via narrator using TikTok TTS. Revamped and back from the dead.

name: VCPanelSettings
description: Control voice settings directly from the voice panel

name: VoiceButtons
description: Send a DM, mute, or deafen any user directly from the voice call panel

name: VoiceChannelLog
description: Logs voice channel activity including joins, leaves, soundboard, mutes, camera, streams, and more

name: VoiceChatUtilities
description: This plugin allows you to perform multiple actions on a whole channel (move, mute, disconnect, etc.) (originally by dutake)

name: VoiceRejoin
description: Automatically rejoins DM and server calls when Discord restarts.

name: VoiceMessageTranscriber
description: Transcribe voice messages locally using Whisper v3.

name: VoiceStats
description: Shows how long you've spent in voice channels with each user on their profile.

name: WaitForSlot
description: Automatically joins a full voice channel when a slot becomes available.

name: WebpackTarball
description: Converts Discord's webpack sources into a tarball.

name: WhosWatching
description: Hover over the screenshare icon to see users watching your stream

name: WhitelistedEmojis
description: Adds the ability to disable all emojis in messages except those in the whitelist.

name: WigglyText
description: Adds a new markdown format that makes text wiggle.

name: ZipPreview
description: Displays the contents of ZIP files directly inside message attachments.
